prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次约3067→2973→2114→1742→1536，整体呈持续前移趋势，近3年累计前移约1400名；2025年基准约1536名，为近年最高水平；本省计划2021–2022年均为31人，2023年增至36人，2024年43人，2025年56人；2026年计划88人，较2025年大幅扩招约57%，竞争压力显著缓解，位次数字预计明显增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第12名（哈工大），近年排名持续上升，学校层次极高；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面事件；抖音热度排名第10（高热），短视频曝光度极高，报考关注度持续升温。2024年曾出现中关注度投档异常信号，但2025年位次已回升至历史高位；机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、力学A+等17个A类学科，工科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等核心工科专业均为高热推荐，社会热度持续走高；甘肃省2026年考生总数约218700人，物理类估算约145700人，较2025年物理类121443人增长约20%，竞争基数扩大。；哈工大（威海）位于山东，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在甘肃招生占比近年约0.5%–1.2%，属外省招生正常水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准1536名、2026年大幅扩招约57%及本省考生增长约20%三方面因素：扩招效应（位次数字增大）显著强于考生增长效应（位次数字减小），但学校声誉高热、专业热度高、抖音曝光度大等因素会吸引更多高分考生，部分抵消扩招带来的位次后移幅度。预计2026年最低位次约2033名，区间1801–2265名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班）
- 工科试验班（计算机与电子通信）
- 软件工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班）
- 工科试验班（电气与自动化）
- 车辆工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（先进材料与智能制造类拔尖班）
- 工科试验班（智能土木类拔尖班）
- 工科试验班（生态环境类拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1801–2265名内，建议以二档工科试验班（机器人与智能装备/电气与自动化）为主攻方向，一档AI领军班和计算机类作为冲刺，三档材料/土木/生态环境类作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（1801名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking approximately changed from 3067 to 2973 to 2114 to 1742 to 1536, showing a continuous forward trend overall, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1400 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1536, the highest level in recent years; the provincial enrollment plan was 31 in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 36 in 2023, 43 in 2024, and 56 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 88, a significant expansion of about 57% compared to 2025, greatly easing competition pressure, and the ranking number is expected to increase noticeably.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, approximately 12th (HIT), with rankings continuously rising in recent years, the school level is extremely high; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative events; Douyin popularity ranking is 10th (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, and application attention continues to heat up. In 2024, there was a medium-attention abnormal admission signal, but the 2025 ranking has rebounded to a historical high; 17 A-class disciplines including Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Mechanics A+, etc., with top-tier engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended with high heat, and social popularity continues to rise; the total number of candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is about 218,700, with an estimated 145,700 in the Physics Category, an increase of about 20% compared to 121,443 in 2025, expanding the competition base. HIT (Weihai) is located in Shandong, not a local university, so there is no local enrollment preference; its enrollment proportion in Gansu in recent years is about 0.5%–1.2%, which is normal for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of the 2025 baseline of 1536, the significant expansion of about 57% in 2026, and the increase of about 20% in provincial candidates: the expansion effect (ranking number increase) is significantly stronger than the candidate increase effect (ranking number decrease), but factors such as high school reputation, high major popularity, and high Douyin exposure will attract more high-scoring candidates, partially offsetting the ranking decline caused by expansion. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 2033, with a range of 1801–2265.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Electronic Communication)
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robot and Intelligent Equipment Top Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electrical and Automation)
- Vehicle Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials and Intelligent Manufacturing Top Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Civil Engineering Top Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Ecological Environment Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 1801–2265, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Robot and Intelligent Equipment/Electrical and Automation) as the main direction, with Tier 1 AI Leading Class and Computer majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 Materials/Civil Engineering/Ecological Environment majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1801), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
